goal: Compile the latest nightly promotion evidence into tracked capability truth so future promotions depend on auditable nightly artifacts rather than transcript-only claims.
successCriteria: Latest nightly gate artifact can be consumed by capability truth, verification report, and scorecard metadata.
Missing or stale nightly evidence fails clearly instead of silently falling back to older truth.
The existing PR verify flow and artifact semantics remain unchanged.
explicitlyOutOfScope: No redesign of the nightly workflow schema from Phase 3 Batch 1.
